caption: A person's arm and hand are visible as they interact with a stack of white boxes and yellow materials on a colorful table featuring palm tree designs. In the upper-left frame, the hand reaches toward the yellow material. By the upper-right frame, the hand has gripped a yellow card and is pulling it from the stack. In the lower-left frame, the hand moves the card, and by the lower-right frame, the person holds up a trading card featuring a baseball player in a blue uniform with the text "EDGAR MARTINEZ" and a signature. A small inset window in each frame shows a man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt and headphones, sitting in front of a computer setup. Each frame contains the logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" in the upper section.
